dashboard.label: SENTINEL Performance
dashboard.description: Executive-facing rollup of SENTINEL's autonomous-SOC performance — throughput, resolution mix, MTTR, cost savings, detection efficacy, and agent uptime. Refreshes every 5 minutes; built for the weekly stakeholder readout.

search.query: index=sentinel_cases earliest=-7d@d latest=now | stats count as total_cases, sum(eval(if(status="CLOSED" AND (autonomous=1 OR autonomous="true" OR resolution!="HUMAN_DENIED"),1,0))) as autonomous_cases, sum(eval((updated_time-created_time)/60)) as total_minutes, count(eval(status="CLOSED")) as closed_cases | eval autonomous_pct=round((autonomous_cases/total_cases)*100,0) | eval mttr_min=round(total_minutes/closed_cases,1) | eval cost_savings=round(autonomous_cases*1*85,0) | eval cost_savings_fmt="$".tostring(cost_savings,"commas") | table total_cases, autonomous_cases, autonomous_pct, mttr_min, cost_savings_fmt
index=sentinel_audit event_type=enrichment earliest=-7d@d latest=now | stats dc(ioc_value) as ioc_count

panel.title: 📊 CASES PROCESSED (7D)
panel.description: Daily volume of cases that entered the SENTINEL pipeline over the last week — the headline throughput metric for capacity planning.

search.query: index=sentinel_cases earliest=-7d@d latest=now | bucket _time span=1d | stats count by _time

panel.title: 🤖 AUTONOMOUS vs HUMAN-ESCALATED
panel.description: Share of closed cases SENTINEL resolved end-to-end versus those that required a human decision. Gold slices are pure autonomy wins; gray slices are the cases SENTINEL correctly recognized it shouldn't handle alone.

search.query: index=sentinel_cases status=CLOSED earliest=-7d@d latest=now | eval resolution_type=if(status="CLOSED" AND (autonomous=1 OR autonomous="true"),"Autonomous","Human-Escalated") | stats count by resolution_type

panel.title: ⚡ AVERAGE MTTR
panel.description: Mean-time-to-respond averaged daily over the trailing two weeks, with a 7-day trend indicator. Green under 15 minutes, yellow 15-30, red beyond 30 — the threshold at which SOC leadership should review autonomy tuning.

search.query: index=sentinel_cases status=CLOSED earliest=-14d@d latest=now | eval mttr_min=round((updated_time-created_time)/60,2) | timechart span=1d avg(mttr_min) as MTTR

panel.title: 📊 COST SAVINGS
panel.description: Estimated analyst-hours saved by autonomous resolution this week, valued at an $85/hour fully-loaded analyst rate, with a trend versus the prior week. The number that justifies the program to the CFO.

search.query: index=sentinel_cases status=CLOSED earliest=-14d@d latest=now | eval is_autonomous=if(autonomous=1 OR autonomous="true",1,0) | bucket _time span=7d | stats sum(is_autonomous) as autonomous_cases by _time | eval analyst_hours_saved=autonomous_cases*1 | eval cost_savings=analyst_hours_saved*85 | sort -_time | head 1 | fields cost_savings

panel.title: 📊 DETECTION EFFICACY
panel.description: 30-day trend of true-positive rate, false-positive rate, and overall agent decision accuracy (mean confidence across all logged decisions). The three lines that prove the model is improving — not just running.

search.query: index=sentinel_cases status=CLOSED earliest=-30d@d latest=now | bucket _time span=1d | stats count as total, sum(eval(resolution="FALSE_POSITIVE")) as fp_count, sum(eval(resolution!="FALSE_POSITIVE")) as tp_count by _time | eval true_positive_rate=round((tp_count/total)*100,1) | eval false_positive_rate=round((fp_count/total)*100,1) | appendcols [ search index=sentinel_audit event_type=decision earliest=-30d@d latest=now | bucket _time span=1d | stats avg(confidence_pct) as agent_accuracy by _time | fields agent_accuracy ] | eval agent_accuracy=round(agent_accuracy,1) | table _time, true_positive_rate, false_positive_rate, agent_accuracy

panel.title: 🤖 THREAT INTEL HARVESTED
panel.description: Count of distinct indicators of compromise (IoCs) Sherlock extracted and enriched over the last 7 days, with a trend indicator versus the prior week — SENTINEL's contribution back to the broader threat-intel program.

search.query: index=sentinel_audit event_type=enrichment earliest=-14d@d latest=now | bucket _time span=1d | stats dc(ioc_value) as new_iocs by _time

panel.title: ⚡ AGENT UPTIME (24H)
panel.description: Hourly online-percentage for each of the four agents over the last 24 hours, derived from sentinel_audit activity heartbeats — a quick visual for spotting any agent that's gone quiet.

search.query: index=sentinel_audit earliest=-24h latest=now agent_name=* | bucket _time span=1h | stats count as activity by _time, agent_name | eval uptime_pct=if(activity>0,100,0) | timechart span=1h max(uptime_pct) as uptime by agent_name

panel.title: 📊 WEEKLY EXECUTIVE REPORT
panel.description: Auto-generated narrative summary of the week's autonomous-SOC performance — the exact paragraph a SOC manager would paste into a stakeholder update, computed live from sentinel_cases and sentinel_audit.

html.div: SENTINEL processed $rpt_total$ cases this week. $rpt_autonomous$ were resolved fully autonomously ($rpt_autonomous_pct$%). Mean time to respond: $rpt_mttr$ min. Estimated cost savings: $rpt_savings$. Sherlock harvested $rpt_iocs$ new indicators of compromise for the broader threat-intel program.
